'''鈭歴-l-f-s''' ('''kasalfesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaden|loaden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaden|loaden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kasalfesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisalfesoko|thisalfesoko]] || [[word:jisalfesoko|jisalfesoko]] || [[word:shisalfesoko|shisalfesoko]] || [[word:kisalfesoko|kisalfesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusalfesoko|thuthusalfesoko]] || [[word:jujusalfesoko|jujusalfesoko]] || [[word:shushusalfesoko|shushusalfesoko]] || [[word:kukusalfesoko|kukusalfesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusalfesoko|thusalfesoko]] || [[word:jusalfesoko|jusalfesoko]] || [[word:shusalfesoko|shusalfesoko]] || [[word:kusalfesoko|kusalfesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosalfesoko|thothosalfesoko]] || [[word:jojosalfesoko|jojosalfesoko]] || [[word:shoshosalfesoko|shoshosalfesoko]] || [[word:kokosalfesoko|kokosalfesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosalfesoko|thosalfesoko]] || [[word:josalfesoko|josalfesoko]] || [[word:shosalfesoko|shosalfesoko]] || [[word:kosalfesoko|kosalfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙salfesoko|th忙salfesoko]] || [[word:j忙salfesoko|j忙salfesoko]] || [[word:sh忙salfesoko|sh忙salfesoko]] || [[word:k忙salfesoko|k忙salfesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasalfesoko|thasalfesoko]] || [[word:jasalfesoko|jasalfesoko]] || [[word:shasalfesoko|shasalfesoko]] || [[word:kasalfesoko|kasalfesoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
